transcript.text:
I'm at Gyeongdong Market
Andong Noodles? I never had it before
[Chives Pancake]
[Bibimbap] (Mixed vegetables with rice)
[Suyuk] (Boiled pork)
Looks good The visuals are great
This much!
I've never had anything like it
Endless amount of noodles
[And she eats endlessly too...]
You look so fragile but can eat so well
[Dongdaemun-gu, Gyeongdong Market]
Hello everyone
I'm at Gyeongdong Market today
I had spicy chicken stew last time
And the local shop owners gave me a recommendation

And this restaurant has been here for 35 years
Completely packed with regulars
It's Andong Noodles I've never had it before
It has Napa cabbage inside Looked very unique
I came here out of curiosity
It's a Monday and the market is filled with customers
This is the entrance to the underground
[Let's go]
It's pretty big here too
[Located very deep inside the lower level...]
[Andong Noodle Restaurant with 35 Years of Tradition]
Hello
It's my first time
-Andong noodles have beans in them -Beans?!
The noodles consist of 40% beans and 60% flour
Gangwon-do people use potatoes, corn, buckwheat, beans

Our past generations started using those ingredients to substitute flour because they were scarce
They have inside seating
But I wanted to get the full market experience
But it's hot!
I asked the owner earlier about their cold noodles But they're not available right now
Not for lunch because it takes a long time for them to make those
So I'll take what they can give me
Suyuk for sure
Chives pancake, Napa cabbage pancake,
Excuse me,
There are 2 different style of noodles to choose from, right?
2 orders of Andong noodles,
1 order of broth noodles,
1 bibimbap,
1 chives pancake, 1 suyuk,
-Not cabbage pancake though -Alright

[Andong Noodles]
[Chives Pancake]
[Bibimbap]
[Suyuk]
[Lunch is served]
Bibimbap?
This is the original Andong noodles?
We give double the portion for our noodles
So that's easily 8 servings
Looks scrumptious The visuals are great
I'll try this first since this is the main
It has a lot of zucchini and cabbage
I don't really eat these types of noodles
Some soup first
Tastes like potato broth
You have to add soy sauce!

You can add these toppings to your preference
Pretty light, but great flavors
Kind of like potato broth? anchovy broth?
Different than janchi noodles (anchovy broth)
It's made with beans
It's pretty nutty
Like nuts...
The beans give it a nutty flavor
Suyuk looks tender and delicious
It's so good!
Chewy and soft
Tasty
1 more bite and I'll add the sauces and toppings
Some fresh kimchi
How much soy sauce should I put in?
Try half a spoon first

Half spoon...
And mix
Some soup
It's refreshing
It's not just like clear broth
It's clear and flavorful
The noodles taste better Something about it
It was a little bland at first
Not it's seasoned
It has so much noodles
This is barely showing the bottom
The cabbage is nice and watery
I don't really drink water when I do mukbangs
But I can't resist barley tea
This isn't barley rice...
It's millet rice I remember it

[It's good as a lettuce wrap with ssamjang] (soybean seasoning paste)
Put some rice on the cabbage
Some ssamjang
The texture of the rice is very unique
There's really not much to it but really tasty
It should be good with suyuk too
I was wondering where the meat was
I need meat in my meals
It's still good without meat
This barely has any flour
I can taste some chewy consistency
It's literally all chives
The elders enjoyed these back in the days
You know when old men grew facial hair in that era, eating a meal can get pretty messy
And if there's food on your beard, you'd look bad So they ate it with a spoon
So they preferred their noodles with less soup so that they can scoop up the noodles and vegetables

This is also not scorching hot
The amount of noodles in here...
I've never seen this much noodles in 1 bowl Shocking...
The bean flavor
Feels stronger
Kinda feels the same
Never-ending
Some on top
This right here is the real bean noodle
Not bean soup
Strong bean flavors in the noodles
[Would you look at that lady...]
Bibimbap...
So pretty and fragile How can you eat so well?
Your face is this small
Thank you

Wow
Okay, that's over 10 servings
But yeah Huge portions
Every single dish here
The pancake is huge too 3 layers
I love how the noodles are not getting bloated
And it's endless
Mix
-Are you Tzuyang? -Yes, hello
Your face is so small
Thank you
[That's amazing...]
This is the bibimbap
It has lots of ingredients
Bibimbap with barley rice is amazing
The sauce is great too

Suyuk on top of this?
This is it
So tasty
Bibimbap is really good
It's not that hot
I was worried that it'll get way too hot
It's not bad
Huge portions on the pancake
Do they use a frying pan this big?
I've been eating a lot of Korean-style pancakes lately
Even yesterday My mom made me some potato pancakes
It was really good
Bibimbap
Wrap
Looks yummy
I ate 1 whole napa cabbage

Today's the day I ate the most amount of vegetables
Gotta eat some soup too
Lots of garlic in this one
It cuts easily The noodles are soft
This tastes more like rice noodles
Beef tartare with this would be end-game
The vegetables make up for it though
I want to bring my grandmother to this restaurant some day
I see a lot of elders dining here
It's amazing with suyuk
I became a master at eating by myself thanks to Mukbang
I can eat alone at hotel restaurants too
[We can't do that]
They give you a lot of food
Really huge portions Market people love to feed you
Including the beverages and everything This has to be like 12 servings

[That's how amazing this is]
I should've left some suyuk for this...
[Finished]
Thanks everyone! [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
